free_tier_content.purpose: Pull agency procurement staff into the Forge ecosystem before paywall. Free content must be genuinely useful — not a teaser, a tool.

free_content: Platform spec table: all 6 NDAA-compliant DFR platforms
Grant procurement friction rating (LOW / MED / HIGH)
CAD integration summary (system names, not depth)
Mission type filter (patrol, SAR, fire, indoor, traffic)
locked_content: CAD integration depth (native vs API vs partial)

free_content: 4 major grant programs listed (COPS Tech, HSGP/SHSP, HSGP/UASI, Ohio DFR Pilot)
Agency, NDAA requirement, AEL requirement, Blue UAS requirement
Real-world award examples (4 agencies with amounts)
locked_content: Common mistakes and how to avoid them

free_content: #1 platform recommendation per mission type (6 missions)
locked_content: Full scored ranking (all eligible platforms with scores)
CAD integration match for mission type

free_content: Aggregate waiver approval stats (214 approved, avg < 7 days)
locked_content: Service provider comparison (Flying Lion, SkyfireAI, SkyFire Consulting)
Part 108 monitoring alerts (email when rule drops)

update_cadence.grant_programs: Monthly (SAA cycle updates) + as-published for new programs

contact_profile: Active DFR program manager (PD or sheriff)
Grant administrator who has applied for drone funding
DFR consulting firm (Flying Lion, SkyfireAI adjacent)
Municipal chief who has publicly discussed DFR

outreach_channels.approach: Join as member. Lurk for 2 weeks to understand live pain points. Then contribute value (share Part 108 updates, AEL clarifications). DM 2-3 engaged members offering free Full Intel report in exchange for 30-min feedback call.
Search: 'DFR program manager' OR 'drone first responder' + police/fire/sheriff. Filter: 2nd degree connections. Warm outreach via shared industry context (DRONERESPONDERS, Blue UAS, Part 108).
Identify commenters on DFR articles who ask questions about grants or platform selection — these are the buyers. Respond with value, DM with Forge offer.

beta_offer.what: Free DFR Full Intel report ($449 value) in exchange for 30-minute feedback call
beta_offer.ask: Which of the 4 report templates is most useful? What's missing? Would you pay $449 for this? What would make it worth more?
beta_offer.goal: 3 positive responses = templates validated. Go/no-go for paid launch.

go_no_go_criteria.go: 3 of 5 beta contacts say: (a) report addresses a real pain point, (b) pricing feels reasonable or low, (c) they would share with a colleague
go_no_go_criteria.no_go: Majority say the content is available elsewhere for free, or pricing is too high for their budget cycle
go_no_go_criteria.pivot_signals: If agencies say they'd rather pay $50 for compliance checklist only → break out grant matrix as standalone product

forge_integration.navigation: Add DFR tab to main Forge nav alongside defense vertical
forge_integration.auth: Free tier: no auth required. Paid tier: email + payment → report delivery via PDF download.

success_metrics.week_1_2: Dashboard live on Forge. 5 beta contacts reached. Free tier indexed by search.
success_metrics.week_3_4: 3+ beta feedback calls completed. Report templates validated or revised.
success_metrics.week_5_6: Paid tier open. First paid report sold.
success_metrics.month_3: 10+ paid reports sold. Monthly recurring subscribers > 0. Part 108 update published to subscribers.
